notes: Solid, feature-complete Breakout implementation with multi-level progression, particles, audio, reinforced bricks, extra life, and high score persistence; minor issue is wall bounce logic has a sign error (vy negated twice) but gameplay remains functional.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Breakout with high polish, attract mode, particles, sound synthesis, and perfect controls.
A solid and mostly complete Breakout build with good controls and presentation, but some nonstandard choices and collision/UX quirks keep it short of excellent.
